Package io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck

Class OrderedCheck<SELF extends OrderedCheck<SELF,T>,T extends Comparable<? super T>>

java.lang.Object
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.AbstractCheck<SELF,T>
io.github.imetaxas.realitycheck.OrderedCheck<SELF,T>
Type Parameters:
SELF - the concrete check type (for fluent chaining)
T - the comparable value type
All Implemented Interfaces:
Check<SELF,T>
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractTemporalCheck, BigDecimalCheck, BigIntegerCheck, ComparableCheck, DurationCheck, NumberCheck
public abstract class OrderedCheck<SELF extends OrderedCheck<SELF,T>,T extends Comparable<? super T>> extends AbstractCheck<SELF,T>
Base class for checks on Comparable values. Provides ordering assertions (greater-than, less-than, between, etc.) using compareTo semantics.
